'''鈭歵h-r-b-l''' ('''katharbeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuther|wuther]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuther|wuther]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-r-b-l
|-
! Lemma
| katharbeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitharbeloko|thitharbeloko]] || [[word:jitharbeloko|jitharbeloko]] || [[word:shitharbeloko|shitharbeloko]] || [[word:kitharbeloko|kitharbeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutharbeloko|thuthutharbeloko]] || [[word:jujutharbeloko|jujutharbeloko]] || [[word:shushutharbeloko|shushutharbeloko]] || [[word:kukutharbeloko|kukutharbeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutharbeloko|thutharbeloko]] || [[word:jutharbeloko|jutharbeloko]] || [[word:shutharbeloko|shutharbeloko]] || [[word:kutharbeloko|kutharbeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutharbeloko|thutharbeloko]] || [[word:jutharbeloko|jutharbeloko]] || [[word:shutharbeloko|shutharbeloko]] || [[word:kutharbeloko|kutharbeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetharbeloko|thetharbeloko]] || [[word:jetharbeloko|jetharbeloko]] || [[word:shetharbeloko|shetharbeloko]] || [[word:ketharbeloko|ketharbeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotharbeloko|thothotharbeloko]] || [[word:jojotharbeloko|jojotharbeloko]] || [[word:shoshotharbeloko|shoshotharbeloko]] || [[word:kokotharbeloko|kokotharbeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotharbeloko|thotharbeloko]] || [[word:jotharbeloko|jotharbeloko]] || [[word:shotharbeloko|shotharbeloko]] || [[word:kotharbeloko|kotharbeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotharbeloko|thotharbeloko]] || [[word:jotharbeloko|jotharbeloko]] || [[word:shotharbeloko|shotharbeloko]] || [[word:kotharbeloko|kotharbeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tharbeloko|th忙tharbeloko]] || [[word:j忙tharbeloko|j忙tharbeloko]] || [[word:sh忙tharbeloko|sh忙tharbeloko]] || [[word:k忙tharbeloko|k忙tharbeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatharbeloko|thathatharbeloko]] || [[word:jajatharbeloko|jajatharbeloko]] || [[word:shashatharbeloko|shashatharbeloko]] || [[word:kakatharbeloko|kakatharbeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatharbeloko|thatharbeloko]] || [[word:jatharbeloko|jatharbeloko]] || [[word:shatharbeloko|shatharbeloko]] || [[word:katharbeloko|katharbeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatharbeloko|thatharbeloko]] || [[word:jatharbeloko|jatharbeloko]] || [[word:shatharbeloko|shatharbeloko]] || [[word:katharbeloko|katharbeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatharbelithi|shatharbelithi]] || [[word:shatharbeliji|shatharbeliji]] || [[word:shatharbelishi|shatharbelishi]] || [[word:shatharbeliki|shatharbeliki]]
